allow: Bash(python -c "import ast; [ast.parse\(open\(f\).read\(\)\) for f in [''prompts.py'', ''llm_processor.py'', ''transcript_processor.py'', ''app.py'']]; print\(''All files parse OK''\)")

Bash(powershell -Command "try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri ''http://localhost:5000/'' -TimeoutSec 5; if \($r.Content -match ''videoSelectionSection''\) { Write-Output ''NEW HTML CONFIRMED'' } else { Write-Output ''OLD HTML'' } } catch { Write-Output ''ERROR: '' + $_Exception.Message }")
